## Testing

## Safety And Compatibility

- [ ] No unintended external mutations
- [ ] Approval-gate behavior considered, if relevant
- [ ] Checkpoint/rewind/worktree behavior considered, if relevant
- [ ] README/docs updated for user-facing behavior changes
